source_meta.source_document: Taperloc Complete Hip System and G7 Acetabular System

systems.system_notes: Primary total hip arthroplasty platform combining the Taperloc Complete femoral stem family with the G7 acetabular system.

trays.tray_notes: The official Taperloc Complete and G7 product materials describe dedicated instrumentation and G7 tray-efficiency claims for the acetabular workflow.

components.component_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe Taperloc Complete as the femoral stem family for the platform.
Official G7 product materials describe the G7 acetabular shell family and cup platform.
Official G7 product materials describe Vivacit-E and other G7 liner options.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Zimmer Biomet product pages describe the implant families but this pass does not expose a public SKU list.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper catalogue or IFU pass is still needed for product-code level expansion.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction captures platform-level tray and implant family rows only.
